aka: Bike Path Rapist: A Cop’s Firsthand Account of Catching the Killer Who Terrorized a Community

cast.name: 西恩·威廉·斯科特 Seann William Scott

writer.name: 阿德里安·斯派科尔特 Adrian Speckert
科里·托德·休斯 Cory Todd Hughes

director.name: 亨利·雅各布森 Henry Jacobson

trans_title: Bike Path Rapist: A Cop’s Firsthand Account of Catching the Killer Who Terrorized a Community
introduction: Based on Dennis Delano and Jeff Schober’s non-fiction work ‘Bike Path Rapist: A Cop’s Firsthand Account of Catching the Killer Who Terrorized a Community’.The film centers around seasoned cold case detective Lissa Redmond and her determined partner, Dennis Delano, who team up with the Buffalo Police Department to crack a chilling, decades-old case. For over 40 years, the serial killer Altemio Sanchez has managed to evade justice, but now, Redmond and Delano are relentless in their pursuit to bring him to justice.
